v1.title: Editorial
v1.desc: Magazine-style consulting landing. Serif display, cream + ink + ochre. Substance over flash.

v2.title: Terminal
v2.desc: Monospace amber-CRT landing that reads like a well-organized tmux session.

v3.title: Manifesto
v3.desc: Five theses, five full-viewport statements. Ultra-high contrast, electric red accent.

v4.title: Swiss Grid
v4.desc: Strict modernist grid, numbered sections, hairline rules. Restraint signals rigor.

v5.title: Pixel
v5.desc: 24x24 pixel motif borrowed from PXL Clock. Playful but credible, LED palette, CRT overlay.

v6.title: Pragmatic Core
v6.desc: Customer-first reference implementation. Basecamp-structural: question hero, empathy, reframe, engagement shapes, proof, about last.

v7.title: Industrial Complex
v7.desc: Anti-Scrum-industry manifesto. Fowler, Jeffries, Thomas, Hunt, Holub pull-quotes. Razor-sharp dark type.

v8.title: AI Foundations
v8.desc: AI-focused customer-first landing. Three foundations diagram. Thoughtworks tone, diagram-forward.

v9.title: In-House Muscle
v9.desc: Clearleft-inspired empowerment pitch. Warm sage + moss + teal. Your team. Sharper. Kept.

v10.title: Questions
v10.desc: The whole page is the customer asking questions. Answers open on disclosure. Low design, high copy.

v11.title: Live Playground
v11.desc: CodeMirror 6 editor in the hero. Visitor edits code; inferred shape renders live. Capability by demonstration.

v12.title: Mesh
v12.desc: Three.js cursor-attracted WebGL mesh gradient hero. Lusion-style wildness with customer-first copy.

v1-pragmatic.title: Editorial · Pragmatic
v1-pragmatic.desc: v1's magazine shell with the customer-first pragmatic-path content. Same designer, different article.

v14.title: The Making
v14.desc: PXL Clock two-person maker-journey as proof-of-craft. Timeline, pinned milestones, image placeholders, customer-first reframe.

v15.title: Horizontal Tour
v15.desc: Vertical scroll pins the viewport; five engagement shapes slide past horizontally. GSAP ScrollTrigger pin.

v16.title: Image Sequence
v16.desc: Canvas scroll-scrubbed 24-frame particle sequence. 576 dots morph ring -> grid -> letterform. Apple-style scrub.

v17.title: Type Atlas
v17.desc: Six customer-frames as huge SVG-text stations, stroke-drawn on scroll via DrawSVG. Motif morphs at section boundaries.

v18.title: Scrub Video
v18.desc: Pinned hero where scroll progress scrubs through five customer-pain phrases. CSS custom property drive, no real video.

v19.title: Reverse Typewriter
v19.desc: Six full-viewport chapters whose characters scatter out and assemble back in between frames. GSAP SplitText.

v20.title: Cursor Diorama
v20.desc: 2.5D workshop scene in six stacked SVG layers with cursor-XY parallax and scroll-Z dolly. Desktop-only interaction.

v21.title: Direct Conversion
v21.desc: Google-Ads-tight bento grid. Single-service focus (AI Adoption Review), above-fold CTA, service-matched mailto.

v22.title: The Channel
v22.desc: YouTube-centric. @ThePureState video titles as proof, privacy-first click-to-load embed, customer-first hero.

v23.title: Three Paths
v23.desc: Split hero: Training / Consulting / Engineering. Three self-qualified paths, three service-matched CTAs.

v24.title: Long Essay
v24.desc: Stripe Press-style 1600-word personal essay The Pragmatic Path with desktop sidenotes and mobile numbered references.

v25.title: Field Notes
v25.desc: Four composite scenario entries in a field-notebook aesthetic. Handwritten margin notes, ruled-paper baselines.

v26.title: Minimal
v26.desc: Ruthless one-pager: 147 visible words, single column, one accent, everything on one desktop viewport.

v6-curiosity.title: Pragmatic · Curiosity
v6-curiosity.desc: v6 Pragmatic Core shell with Batch-4 rebalance: PXL demoted to curiosity trail, YouTube prominently linked, above-fold CTA.
